commands.repair_reason: No ClawSweeper repair lane is needed because the PR already contains the focused code and regression tests, with no actionable review finding found.; Cleared: The diff changes Gateway error propagation and tests only; I found no new dependency, workflow, permission, secret-handling, or supply-chain concern. commands.review_summary:
The PR refactors GatewayClient connect-challenge handling so local connect assembly failures are marked, reported through onConnectError, and surfaced by callGateway without waiting for the wrapper timeout.

Reproducibility: yes. A high-confidence source reproduction is to send connect.challenge to callGateway with malformed device identity PEM; current main throws during local signing under handleMessage's broad catch and the wrapper has no connect-error settlement path.
